extraction_note: Primary HTML source was provided as rendered markdown rather than raw HTML with inline styles or embedded <style> blocks, meaning no verbatim hex codes, font-family declarations, SVG gradients, or Tailwind arbitrary-value classes were extractable from html_source. All colour values are therefore sourced from branding_json and validated against usage context described in the markdown content. branding_json.components.buttonPrimary.background is listed as #F9F8F6 (the page background cream) with textColor #FFFFFF — this appears to be a mis-read by the upstream branding API (the actual CTA 'Book Demo' button is almost certainly a dark or brand-blue fill, not the page background colour). The #374EBE secondary/blue is the most plausible CTA fill based on the button shadow value rgba(55, 78, 190, 0.2) in buttonPrimary, which decodes exactly to rgb(55,78,190) = #374EBE — this confirms #374EBE is the actual primary CTA fill. branding_json.colorScheme is listed as 'light'; the markdown content and background hex #F9F8F6 confirm a light-dominant scheme with dark text/navy, so colorScheme is accepted as light. branding_json.colors.accent is #F9F8F6 which is identical to background — this is a JSON labelling error; #F9F8F6 is the background/surface, not an accent. #374EBE functions as the true accent/CTA colour. All font values sourced from branding_json typography as no font-family declarations were present in html_source. borderRadius of 12px sourced from branding_json.components buttons as primary shape token; 2px spacing borderRadius noted but likely applies to micro-elements. No SVG gradients were present in the provided source. No CSS gradient strings were found. gradients array is empty.

palette.name: Deep Navy
palette.usage: Primary brand colour for headings, hero section backgrounds, and dominant text elements; use as the main dark canvas in cover images and infographic frames

palette.name: Brand Blue
palette.usage: Primary accent and CTA fill colour; confirmed by buttonPrimary shadow rgba(55,78,190,0.2) which decodes to this exact hex; use for call-to-action elements, data highlights, stat callout numerals, and key emphasis strokes in infographics

palette.name: Warm Off-White
palette.usage: Primary page background and light surface; use as base canvas for light-mode infographic backgrounds and card surfaces

palette.name: Mid Grey
palette.usage: Body text, supporting copy, metadata labels, and secondary descriptors; use for infographic body text and supporting annotations

palette.name: Pure White
palette.usage: Secondary button backgrounds and card surfaces against the off-white page background; use for elevated card surfaces in infographics

palette.name: Light Border Grey
palette.usage: Subtle border and divider colour for cards, secondary buttons, and rule separators; use as thin divider strokes in infographic layouts

colours.proportion_rule: 60% background tones (#F9F8F6, #FFFFFF), 25% primary navy (#151B28) for headings and structural elements, 10% body/muted text (#676F7E), 5% accent blue (#374EBE) for CTAs, highlights, and key data points

backgrounds.light_variant: Solid warm off-white #F9F8F6 as primary canvas, white #FFFFFF for elevated card surfaces, light border #DCDFE5 for structural separation
backgrounds.dark_variant: Solid deep navy #151B28 for hero sections, headers, and dark-mode panel treatments

borders_and_rules.application: Secondary buttons, card containers, and section dividers

decorative_elements: Numbered step indicators (01–06) used as large typographic anchors in feature sections, rendered in brand blue #374EBE or navy #151B28
Architecture diagram with connected node layout showing control plane flow between user-facing systems, AI models, tools, and internal systems
Metric callout badges displaying performance stats (+3B Tokens/Day, <1% Compliance Violations, <20ms Latency) as prominent hero-section proof points
Compliance certification badge row (SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR, FERPA, NIST AI RMF, ISO 27001)

iconography.colour_usage: Icons and UI marks rendered in #374EBE accent blue or #151B28 navy against light backgrounds; muted secondary icons in #676F7E grey

data_visualisation.chart_aesthetic: Minimal flat style with no visible gridlines; clean sans-serif axis labels in Inter #676F7E; data-forward presentation aligned with enterprise dashboard aesthetic
data_visualisation.stat_callout_format: Large bold numeral in Inter 700 weight in #151B28 navy or #374EBE accent blue, with compact descriptor label in Inter regular #676F7E directly below; metric value visually dominant at 2–3× label size

brand_marks.logo_placement_convention: Top-left on page headers and cover assets; centered on social square assets

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative gradients or rainbow colour treatments not grounded in the brand palette
brand_guardrails.instead: Use flat solid fills from the documented palette: #151B28 navy, #374EBE blue, #F9F8F6 off-white, and #676F7E grey

brand_guardrails.avoid: Warm, playful, or rounded-organic visual styles (bubbly UI, cartoon illustration, hand-drawn strokes)
brand_guardrails.instead: Maintain clean-geometric flat vector style with slightly-rounded 12px corners and precision-technical line quality reflecting enterprise compliance positioning

brand_guardrails.avoid: Oversaturated or consumer-oriented colour palettes (bright orange, vivid green, neon tones)
brand_guardrails.instead: Restrict palette to the five documented brand hexes; use #374EBE as the single accent for highlights and CTAs

brand_guardrails.avoid: Heavy drop shadows, embossed 3D effects, or dramatic vignettes
brand_guardrails.instead: Apply the documented soft blue-tinted shadow (rgba(55,78,190,0.2) 0px 4px 20px -4px) sparingly on interactive or elevated card elements only

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative serif typefaces, display script fonts, or mixed font stacks
brand_guardrails.instead: Use Inter exclusively across all weights; maintain typographic hierarchy with weight contrast (700 for headings, 400–500 for body) rather than typeface switching

brand_guardrails.avoid: Light, airy, or consumer-lifestyle photographic imagery
brand_guardrails.instead: Use technical platform UI screenshots (as in the documented trussed-platform-cropped asset), architecture diagrams, and dashboard visualisations aligned with the enterprise AI infrastructure context

generation_suffixes.core: Deep navy #151B28 structural foundations with warm off-white #F9F8F6 canvas surfaces and brand blue #374EBE precision accents. Inter typeface throughout in bold geometric weight. Slightly-rounded 12px corners on all containers. Flat minimal surfaces with soft blue-tinted shadow depth. Enterprise compliance authority tone — technically precise, institutional, structured.
generation_suffixes.infographic: Deep navy #151B28 and warm off-white #F9F8F6 palette with #374EBE blue reserved for data highlights, stat numerals, and key metric callouts. Inter bold for numeral-forward stat callouts at dominant scale, Inter regular in #676F7E for supporting labels. Flat clean-geometric vector style with subtle #DCDFE5 border rules separating data zones. Enterprise technical register — authoritative, data-forward, compliance-focused.
generation_suffixes.cover_image: Deep navy #151B28 dominant canvas with warm off-white #F9F8F6 typographic contrast and #374EBE brand blue for title emphasis strokes or highlight treatments. Inter bold display weight for cover headline typography. Slightly-rounded 12px geometric containers. Clean flat surfaces with soft blue-shadow depth (rgba(55,78,190,0.2)). Institutional enterprise AI authority tone — precise, structured, governance-ready.
generation_suffixes.social_square: Warm off-white #F9F8F6 or deep navy #151B28 canvas with #374EBE accent blue for focal emphasis and Inter bold typographic treatment. Flat minimal aesthetic with clean geometric shapes and 12px rounded containers. Subtle #DCDFE5 border rules for structural clarity. Compact enterprise authority tone — credible, technically grounded, compliance-assured.
